name: Credit
description: Credit cards, loans, financial products involving credit decisions. Campaigns promoting lending products or credit-related services.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US Equal Credit Opportunity Act (ECOA)
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Prohibits targeting by race, color, religion, national origin, sex, marital status, age, or public assistance status in credit advertising.

guidance: Mortgage lending campaigns should use 'housing' rather than 'credit' — FHA restrictions are stricter. Use 'credit' for non-housing lending: credit cards, auto loans, personal loans, student loans.
